text.title: Claude API Integration Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure that maps from a request (model selected, prompt drafted) to a production-ready integration record + code.

step.name: confirm-model-and-shape
step.input: Model id from decision-framework; expected request rate; whether agentic tools are involved; whether output is structured.
step.action: Classify the integration shape into one of {sync, streaming, tool-loop, batch}. If no human waits and ≥100 requests, choose batch. If tools or multi-turn agent, choose tool-loop. If streaming UX is required, choose streaming. Else sync.
step.output: shape ∈ {sync, streaming, tool-loop, batch}; model_id; max_tokens by tier.

step.name: assemble-system-and-tools
step.input: System prompt text; tool registry; output schema (if structured).
step.action: Order content longest-stable-prefix first: (a) system instructions, (b) tool schemas, (c) static retrieved corpus, (d) dynamic user turn LAST. If structured output needed, declare a single output_tool whose input_schema is the target shape.
step.output: System+content array in cacheable order; tool list (≤10); optional forced output_tool.
step.decision-gate: If system+tools block is <1024 tokens (Sonnet/Opus) or <2048 (Haiku), DO NOT attach cache_control — it will silently no-op.

step.name: attach-cache-markers
step.action: Attach cache_control={"type":"ephemeral"} to the last block of the stable prefix. For 1-hour TTL (cache write 2× base) only when request gap is consistently >5 min and burst rate justifies the surcharge.

step.name: wrap-loop-and-retry
step.input: shape from step 1; tool list; secrets handle.
step.action: For shape=tool-loop: wrap messages.create in for-range(MAX_TURNS=10) and validate every tool input against its input_schema. For all shapes: wrap the call in retry-with-jitter (max_attempts=5). Load ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from secrets manager.
step.output: Production-ready code with MAX_TURNS, schema validation, retry, and secrets discipline.
step.decision-gate: If shape=batch: skip MAX_TURNS (no loop), emit batches.create + polling code instead.

step.name: instrument-telemetry
step.action: Capture per-call: response.usage.input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, thinking_tokens. Tag with model, shape, tool_use_count. Push to observability stack.
step.output: Live cache hit rate, cost per call, and turn-count distribution dashboards.

step.name: emit-integration-record
step.action: Produce the JSON integration-record per content/02-output-contract.xml. Run scripts/validate-claude-api.py against it. Commit the record alongside the code so audit / cost-tracker tooling can read configured posture.
step.output: Validated cai-* record file; pre-commit gate passes.
